compatibility.identity: did:nostr with 64-char lowercase x-only secp256k1 BIP-340 pubkeys shared across all six repos; NIP-98 HTTP auth required for solid-pod-rs WAC and nostr-rust-forum event signing; agentbox mints identity via management-api/lib/uris.js as did:nostr:<hex-pubkey>; VisionClaw graph governance uses the same pubkey for urn:visionclaw scoped URNs; dreamlab-ai-website forum config references the shared identity mesh
compatibility.mesh: NIP-42 authenticated relay writes for nostr-rust-forum; IS-Envelope routing between solid-pod-rs pod-inbox bridge and relay; VisionClaw standalone by default (federation.mode=standalone in agentbox.toml); agentbox adapter slots (beads, pods, memory, events, orchestrator) resolve to local-* in standalone mode or external endpoints in client mode; dreamlab-ai-website operates independently with Cloudflare Workers tier
compatibility.pod: Two-tier architecture: solid-pod-rs v0.4.0-alpha.15 is canonical for native Solid pods with WAC and DPoP; Cloudflare Workers pod tier (dreamlab-ai-website) provides edge-cached read replicas with documented feature differences (no server-side SPARQL, simplified ACL); pod-inbox bridge in nostr-rust-forum relays NIP-42 events to pod LDP containers
compatibility.governance: Agent Control Surface event kinds 31400-31405 are the human decision plane; kind 31400 (policy), 31401 (override), 31402 (approval), 31403 (rejection), 31404 (delegation), 31405 (revocation); nostr-rust-forum is the relay substrate; VisionClaw governance adapter consumes these events for graph mutation authorization
compatibility.verification: Run npm run verify in VisionFlow for cross-repo consistency checks; cargo test in VisionClaw (v0.1.0), solid-pod-rs (v0.4.0-alpha.15), and nostr-rust-forum (v3.0-rc3); npm test in agentbox (v0.1.0) and dreamlab-ai-website (v1.0.0); contract tests in agentbox/tests/contract/ must pass for all three adapter implementation classes per slot; 4 repos have uncommitted changes that must be resolved before promoting to released
